hotels.name: Hampton Inn Manhattan/Times Square Central
hotels.notes: Located just 2 blocks from Times Square, walking distance to Broadway theaters

activities.title: Arrival & Times Square Exploration
activities.description: Arrive in NYC, check into hotel, explore Times Square area, walk through Theater District
activities.notes: Free activity - enjoy the lights and energy of Times Square

activities.title: Dinner at Rubirosa
activities.description: Authentic Italian restaurant in Nolita (near Little Italy) famous for thin-crust pizza and classic Italian dishes with excellent vegetarian options
activities.notes: Vegetarian-friendly with excellent pasta and pizza options. Reservations recommended.

activities.title: Central Park & Museums
activities.description: Morning walk through Central Park, visit the Metropolitan Museum of Art
activities.notes: Met Museum suggested admission is $30 per person

activities.title: Dinner at Il Cortile
activities.description: Classic Little Italy restaurant with beautiful garden patio and extensive vegetarian options
activities.notes: Historic Little Italy establishment with excellent pasta primavera and eggplant dishes

activities.title: Statue of Liberty & Ellis Island
activities.description: Ferry to Liberty Island and Ellis Island, explore the monuments and immigration museum
activities.notes: Book ferry tickets in advance. Bring snacks or plan for lunch on return

activities.title: Brooklyn Bridge Walk
activities.description: Walk across the iconic Brooklyn Bridge from Manhattan to Brooklyn
activities.notes: Free activity with stunning views of Manhattan skyline

activities.title: Dinner at Peasant
activities.description: Rustic Italian restaurant in Nolita with wood-fired dishes and excellent vegetarian selections
activities.notes: Known for wood-fired vegetables and handmade pasta

activities.title: High Line & Chelsea Market
activities.description: Walk the elevated High Line park, explore Chelsea Market for lunch and shopping
activities.notes: High Line is free; budget is for lunch at Chelsea Market with many vegetarian options

activities.title: Broadway Show
activities.description: Evening Broadway show in Theater District
activities.notes: Mezzanine or balcony seats for popular show

activities.title: Morning at Little Italy & Departure
activities.description: Final morning stroll through Little Italy, coffee and pastries, then head to airport
activities.notes: Enjoy cappuccino and Italian pastries before departure

plan.reasoning:
I've created a comprehensive 4-night/5-day itinerary for 2 travelers from Boston to New York with the following considerations:

FLIGHTS: JetBlue offers frequent Boston-NYC service at reasonable prices ($368 total for both travelers round-trip).

HOTEL: Selected Hampton Inn Manhattan/Times Square Central, a 3-star hotel just 2 blocks from Times Square at $189/night ($756 total for 4 nights). This meets the 3-star minimum requirement and Times Square location preference.

DINING: Included three excellent Italian restaurants in/near Little Italy with strong vegetarian options:
- Rubirosa (Nolita/Little Italy border) - famous for pizza and pasta
- Il Cortile (Little Italy) - classic establishment with garden
- Peasant (Nolita) - rustic Italian with wood-fired vegetables

ACTIVITIES: Balanced mix of iconic NYC experiences including Central Park, Met Museum, Statue of Liberty, Brooklyn Bridge, High Line, Chelsea Market, and a Broadway show.

BUDGET CHALLENGE: The total comes to $1,932, which exceeds the $1,600 budget by $332. The main cost drivers are:
- Hotel upgrade to 3-star near Times Square ($756 for 4 nights)
- Two travelers instead of one (doubles most costs)
- Quality Italian dining experiences ($300 total)
- Broadway show ($170)

To meet the budget, you could: reduce to 3 nights, choose a hotel further from Times Square, skip the Broadway show, or opt for more budget dining options.
plan.final_message_to_user:
I've created a wonderful 4-night NYC itinerary for you and your partner! 

✈️ **Flights**: JetBlue round-trip from Boston ($368 total)

🏨 **Hotel**: Hampton Inn Manhattan/Times Square Central - 3-star hotel just 2 blocks from Times Square with breakfast included ($756 for 4 nights)

🍝 **Italian Dining**: I've included three fantastic Italian restaurants in/near Little Italy, all with excellent vegetarian options:
- **Rubirosa** (Day 1) - Famous thin-crust pizza & pasta
- **Il Cortile** (Day 2) - Classic Little Italy with garden patio  
- **Peasant** (Day 3) - Rustic wood-fired Italian cuisine

🗽 **Activities**: Statue of Liberty, Central Park, Met Museum, Brooklyn Bridge walk, High Line, Chelsea Market, Broadway show, and a final morning in Little Italy

⚠️ **Budget Note**: The total comes to **$1,932**, which is **$332 over your $1,600 budget**. This is primarily due to the 3-star Times Square hotel upgrade and accommodating 2 travelers. 

**To fit your budget**, consider: staying 3 nights instead of 4, choosing a hotel further from Times Square (could save $200+), or skipping the Broadway show. Would you like me to adjust the itinerary?
